title: Remote Ethernet Error Response
description:
Remote Ethernet Error Response

Remote Ethernet Error Response

When the Controller can not receive the remote command correctly, the error response is shown in the following format.

Format: ![Remote command],[Error code] terminator

Error Code	Contents

10	Remote command does not begin with $

11	Remote command is wrong

Login is not executed

12	Remote command format is wrong

13	Login command password is wrong

14	Specified number to acquire is out of range

(Less than 1 or more than 100)

Number to acquire is omitted

Specified a string parameter

15	Parameter is not existed

Dimension of parameter is wrong
Element out of range is called

20	Controller is not ready

21	Cannot execute since the Execute is running

99	System error

Communication error

Communication Sequence
